The '''''Huntress''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] under the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ''Huntress'' had tried unsuccessfully, to destroy the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'', despite assistance with the [[Pakuuni Pirates]], and with some starfighters armed with [[Proton rocket/Legends|proton rockets]] rather than [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. The ''Ludwick'', which was waiting for the materials and equipment for the construction of space installation [[NL-1]] and the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']] was being protected by Imperial ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]]. The ''Huntress'' though had escaped destruction.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
